author: y4rr
content: Observation: ResNet50 (and other vision models) do NOT override Module::named_children / Module::children. ferrotorch-nn defines named_modules() / named_descendants_dyn() with a default implementation that traverses children(); since ResNet50.children() returns Vec::new() by default, named_modules() on a ResNet50 yields just ("", &self) — no BN subtree. The pre-flight's recommended dispatch (loader walks named_modules() and downcasts each to a BN type) thus cannot apply BN buffers in any current ferrotorch-vision model. Coordination boundary 'NO changes to ferrotorch-vision/src/' blocks the obvious fix (overriding named_children on ResNet/etc.). This is a Phase 1B-audit-style architectural-completion gap. Will treat as a hard-failure path in the loader (no silent skip) so the failure surfaces, file a follow-up issue, and report REDIRECT-NEEDED to the architect for them to weigh in on whether to relax the boundary or accept resnet50_value_parity failing.
